title: Golden Globes 2026: Supporting Actor Winners
text: Deadline reports on the Golden Globes 2026 supporting actor awards. In the male supporting actor motion picture category, Stellan Skarsgård won Best Performance By A Male Actor In A Supporting Role for his work in Neon's Sentimental Value. This Norwegian drama marked another victory for foreign cinema at the ceremony. In male supporting actor television, Owen Cooper claimed the award for Best Performance By A Male Actor In A Supporting Role On Television for Netflix's Adolescence. The 16-year-old set a record as the youngest person to win this Globe category, matching his earlier Emmy achievement. In female supporting actor motion picture, Teyana Taylor earned Best Performance By A Female Actor In A Supporting Role In Any Motion Picture for her role in Warner Bros. One Battle After Another. Upon accepting, she paid tribute to her brown sisters, continuing her strong awards-season momentum. In female supporting actor television, Erin Doherty won Best Performance By A Female Actor In A Supporting Role On Television for her work on Netflix's Adolescence, which swept all four categories in which it competed.
